params.name: Quantum-I
params.description:
On Mar 31, 1987 AD, Quantum-one was launched into space by a proton carrier rocket.
Quantum-1 is a module docked with the Soviet Mir Space Station and the first experimental module of it. It carries equipment for astrophysics, biotechnology experiments, and experimental cabins, supporting astronomical observation, geographical observation, material testing, and biomedical experiments simultaneously. During its more than ten years of operation, it has taken many photos of celestial bodies and …
